queijadas-da-pereira-teleculinaria.name: Queijadas Da Pereira
instructions: Prepare the dough: peel the flour for a bowl and reserve. Melt the butter in hot water and add it to the flour. Season with salt and work the ingredients well until you get a homogeneous dough. Let it rest for an hour.
Prepare the filling: pass the fresh cheeses through a hammock and mix their yolks and sugar, stirring well.
After the specified time, extend the mass on a floured surface. Cut in circles and, with them, line the interior in small shapes, previously greased with butter.
Distribute the filling through the lined forms, put them on a tray and put them in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 20 minutes. Take it off, let it dampen and deform. Serve right away.
